name: Check of books availability in LYRASIS
fullName: Catalog Navigation: Check of books availability in LYRASIS

steps.name: When  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
When  I open categories by chain and chain starts from CategoryScreen:
And  The book availability is ALL by default on subcategory screen
And  There are availability by 'All', 'Available now' and 'Yours to keep' on subcategory screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Check of books availability in LYRASIS

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Check of books availability in LYRASIS
